1. area of zen garden = πr²  
area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
total area = 20 × 15 = 300 m²  
area for dining tables + zen garden = 300  
3πr² = 300  
r² = 100/π  
r = √(100/π) ≈ 5.64 m  

2. fountain radius = r/3 ≈ 1.88 m  
surface area (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.8 m²  
cost = 17.8 × 50 = 890
